name: Product Recall
description: Product recall insurance covering food & beverage manufacturers, consumer goods, pharmaceuticals and automotive. Covers recall costs, business interruption, loss of profit and third party liability.

name: Upstream / Offshore Energy
description: Upstream and offshore energy insurance covering exploration and production assets, drilling rigs, production platforms, FPSOs, subsea infrastructure, marine support vessels and control of well operations.

name: Renewable Energy – Offshore
description: Offshore renewable energy insurance covering operational and construction wind farms, wave and tidal energy installations, offshore substations, export cables and O&M vessels.

name: Renewable Energy – Onshore
description: Onshore renewable energy insurance covering operational and construction wind farms, solar PV and CSP installations, battery energy storage systems (BESS), biomass and hydro plants.

name: Downstream / Onshore Energy
description: Downstream and onshore energy insurance covering refineries, petrochemical plants, pipelines, LNG terminals, power generation facilities (non-renewable) and industrial energy assets. Includes process safety management, Nat-CAT exposure, VCE/fire perils and BI.

name: Environmental Liability
description: Environmental impairment liability (EIL) and pollution liability insurance covering gradual and sudden pollution, third party bodily injury, property damage, cleanup costs and regulatory defence.

name: Cyber
description: Cyber insurance covering data breach response, business interruption from network outages, ransomware, cyber extortion, privacy liability, regulatory fines and cyber property damage.

name: Directors & Officers (D&O)
description: Directors and officers liability insurance protecting executives and board members against claims alleging wrongful acts, breach of fiduciary duty, misrepresentation and corporate governance failures. Includes EPL (employment practices liability) and fiduciary liability.

name: Employment Practices Liability (EPLI)
description: Employment practices liability insurance covering claims of wrongful termination, discrimination, harassment, failure to promote and other employment-related claims.

name: Transactional Liability (W&I / Tax)
description: Transactional liability insurance covering M&A warranty and indemnity (W&I), tax liability and contingent/contested risk policies supporting corporate transactions.

name: PI E&O – Legal Professions
description: Professional indemnity insurance for solicitors, barristers, law firms and legal professionals covering negligence, errors and omissions, breach of duty and civil liability claims.

name: PI E&O – Accountants
description: Professional indemnity for accountants, auditors, tax advisers and financial professionals covering negligent audit opinions, tax advice errors and financial statement misstatements.

name: PI E&O – Construction & Engineering
description: Professional indemnity for architects, engineers, surveyors, designers and construction consultants covering design defects, specification errors and professional negligence.

name: PI E&O – Technology & Telecom
description: Technology professional indemnity and errors & omissions insurance for IT companies, software developers, telecoms providers and technology service firms.

name: PI E&O – Financial Institutions
description: Professional indemnity and errors & omissions for banks, insurance companies, asset managers, stockbrokers and financial services firms.

name: PI E&O – Miscellaneous
description: Miscellaneous professional indemnity for consultants, management consultants, estate agents, property professionals, insurance brokers and other professional service providers.

name: Crime / Fidelity – Financial Institutions
description: Fidelity, bankers blanket bond and computer crime insurance for banks, investment firms and financial institutions covering employee dishonesty, forgery, electronic crime and social engineering fraud.

name: Crime / Fidelity – Commercial
description: Fidelity and commercial crime insurance for corporate entities covering employee theft, forgery, computer fraud, funds transfer fraud and social engineering for non-financial businesses.

name: Commercial Property
description: Commercial property insurance covering physical damage to buildings and contents, business interruption, US and non-US risks across primary, full value and excess layers, including property binders.

name: Engineering & Construction
description: Engineering insurance covering contractors all risk (CAR), erection all risk (EAR), machinery breakdown, boiler & machinery and contract works for annual and single-project construction risks.

name: General Liability – USA
description: Non-marine general and miscellaneous liability insurance for US risks covering public liability, products liability, completed operations, premises liability and umbrella/excess coverage.

name: General Liability – Non-USA
description: Non-marine general and miscellaneous liability insurance for non-US risks covering public liability, products liability, premises and operations liability worldwide (excluding USA).

name: Employers Liability – UK
description: UK employers liability insurance covering employee injury and illness arising from work activities, a compulsory cover for UK employers under the Employers Liability (Compulsory Insurance) Act 1969.

name: Workers Comp / EL – International
description: International workers compensation and employers liability for multinational workforces outside the USA and UK, covering statutory workers comp obligations and employer liability globally.

name: Workers Compensation – USA
description: US workers compensation insurance covering statutory workers comp benefits for injured employees and employer's liability, including per-person and catastrophe-exposed programmes.

name: Marine Hull
description: Marine hull insurance covering physical damage to oceangoing vessels including tankers, bulk carriers, containerships, passenger ships and their machinery, plus total loss only and loss of hire.

name: Marine Hull War
description: Marine hull war risk insurance covering vessels against war, strikes, terrorism, confiscation, piracy and related political violence perils, including breach voyage cover.

name: Marine Cargo
description: Marine cargo insurance covering goods in transit by sea, air and land including all risks cover, open covers, storage and inland transit, cargo war and cargo liability.

name: Marine Liability
description: Marine legal liability insurance covering port operators, charterers, ship repairers, stevedores and other marine contractors for third party liability, pollution and collision liability.

name: Yachts
description: Yacht and pleasure craft insurance covering sailing yachts, motor yachts, superyachts and racing vessels for hull damage, third party liability, personal accident and war risks.

name: Aviation Hull
description: Aviation hull insurance covering physical damage to airline and general aviation aircraft including passenger jets, freighters, turboprops, helicopters and business jets.

name: Aviation Liability
description: Aviation liability insurance for airlines and general aviation operators covering passenger liability, third party property damage, products liability for aerospace manufacturers and premises liability.

name: Personal Accident & Health
description: Personal accident and health insurance covering accidental death, disability, medical expenses, travel insurance, sports disability, creditor protection and kidnap & ransom for maritime contexts.

name: Medical Malpractice & Healthcare
description: Medical malpractice and healthcare liability insurance for hospitals, institutional healthcare providers, individual medical professionals and long-term care providers in the USA and internationally.

name: Motor – UK
description: UK motor insurance covering private cars, motorcycles, fleet and commercial vehicles with comprehensive and non-comprehensive coverage including third party, fire and theft.

name: Motor – International
description: International motor insurance covering vehicles in the USA, Canada, EU/EEA and rest of world including physical damage, third party liability and combined motor programmes.

name: Political Risk
description: Political risk insurance covering confiscation, expropriation, nationalisation and deprivation (CEND), political violence, forced abandonment, contract frustration and investment protection for overseas assets.

name: Credit & Contract Frustration
description: Trade credit insurance covering buyer default, insolvency and political risk; contract frustration insurance for frustrated export contracts; and whole turnover credit programmes.

name: Terrorism & Political Violence
description: Standalone terrorism and political violence insurance covering acts of terrorism, riots, civil commotion, strikes, sabotage, active assailant and war on land for property and liability.

name: Event Cancellation & Contingency
description: Event cancellation, abandonment and non-appearance insurance for concerts, sporting events, conferences and exhibitions; pandemic cover; prize indemnity; and miscellaneous contingency.

name: Agricultural Crop & Forestry
description: Agricultural crop and forestry insurance covering multi-peril crop insurance (MPCI), named peril crop, crop hail, forestry and XOL treaty reinsurance for agricultural risks.

name: Livestock & Bloodstock
description: Livestock and bloodstock insurance covering mortality and loss of use of horses, cattle, exotic animals and farm livestock including XOL reinsurance.

name: Fine Art, Specie & Jewellery
description: Fine art, specie, jewellery and cash in transit insurance covering fine art collections, museum exhibits, general specie, vault risks, jewellers block and armoured carrier operations.

name: Space
description: Space insurance covering satellite launch, commissioning period and in-orbit transponder operations plus space liability for launch vehicles and satellite operators.

name: Nuclear
description: Nuclear insurance covering physical damage to nuclear power plants and liability arising from nuclear incidents including pools-backed nuclear property damage and nuclear liability.

name: Film & Entertainment
description: Film insurance covering production risks including cast insurance, negative film, faulty stock, props, sets and costumes, production delay and completion bonds.

name: Extended Warranty
description: Extended warranty insurance backing manufacturer, retailer and third-party warranty programmes for consumer electronics, white goods, vehicles and other consumer products.

name: Legal Expenses
description: Legal expenses insurance (LEI) covering legal costs for individuals and businesses in employment disputes, contract disputes, property disputes, personal injury and tax enquiries.

name: Mortgage, Title, Surety & Financial Guarantee
description: Specialist financial lines insurance including mortgage indemnity, title insurance for property transactions, surety bonds for construction and contract performance, and financial guarantees.
